root: The square of an odd number is odd. Proof:
finalText: The square of an odd number is odd. Proof: Let n = 2k + 1. Then, n² = 4k² + 4k + 1 = 2(2k² + 2k) + 1. QED.

steps.why: This exhibits n² as 2·(integer) + 1: the definition of odd.
